---
title: "Ali Ghelichkhani"
sortby: "1"
subtitle: "Research Assistant"
image: ali.jpg
started: "2026"
interests: "Machine Learning · Materials Informatics · MD Simulations"
toc: false
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla

---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Research Assistants</li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}
:::

## Research Interests

- Machine Learning & Deep Learning
- Materials Informatics & AI-driven Discovery
- Computational Materials Science & Microscopy

## Education

- **Sharif University of Technology, Tehran, Iran**
  - Bachelor of Science, Materials Science and Engineering (Sep 2019 - Jul 2024)
  - Minor in Computer Science (Sep 2020 - Jul 2024)

## Work Experience

- **AI Software Engineer** · Nobitex, Tehran, Iran (Sep 2021 - Sep 2025)

## Research Experience

- **Research Assistant** · Sharif University of Technology (May 2022 - Jun 2023)
  - Deep Learning in Structure Analysis of Bulk Metallic Glasses
  - Supervisor: Dr. Rouhollah Tavakoli
  - Developed a Neural Network to predict Voronoi indices of atoms in simulated Bulk Metallic Glass (BMG) samples.
  - Combined Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulation data with Deep Learning models.
